# Josh Reeder-Esparza

> Full-stack developer, engineer, and designer based in Knoxville, Tennessee. Over a decade of experience building web products from scratch — agency work across restaurants, wineries, hotels, and churches; four years as the first engineer at a Rails-based SaaS (MxU); and now Head of Engineering at AltText.ai, where I lead a platform that serves 70,000+ users. I also run Sola Co, a consulting firm.

## Quick Facts

- Location: Knoxville, TN
- Current role: Head of Engineering at AltText.ai (Late 2024 – Present)
- Consulting: Owner of Sola Co — Rails, full-stack, performance, DevOps
- Previous: First engineer at MxU; MRR more than tripled in 4 years
- Primary stack: Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, Sidekiq, TailwindCSS, Hotwire (Stimulus + Turbo)
- Also comfortable with: JavaScript, React, Next.js, esbuild, PHP, WordPress, Shopify
- DevOps: AWS, Heroku, Docker, Nginx, CI/CD
- AI integrations built: OpenAI GPT Vision, Azure Computer Vision, Replicate

## What I'm Working On

At AltText.ai, I scale infrastructure for 70,000+ users, build integrations (WordPress, Shopify, BigCommerce, Contentful, and more), and implement AI-powered image description pipelines using OpenAI and Azure Computer Vision. The platform helps businesses meet WCAG, ADA, and EAA accessibility requirements while improving SEO.

Through Sola Co, I work with teams that need help with Rails apps, database optimization, API design, and frontend development. If you need someone who can move fast in a codebase they didn't write, that's kind of my thing.

## Distinctive Bits

- I care a lot about web performance — LCP, FCP, CLS, responsive images, CDN edge. Speed is a feature.
- Accessibility isn't an afterthought for me. I've seen the drive-by ADA lawsuits hit hotel clients. Good HTML is good accessibility.
- I have genuine agency experience — not just SaaS. Custom CMS dashboards for wine country, restaurant groups, commodity boards. The kind of work where you have to balance a brand with 3 fonts against a 3G connection.
- I ran Etsy shops hand-crafting leather goods (belts, wallets, ties) and shipped internationally. That's in the past but it says something.
- I live in Knoxville with my wife and kids. We garden seriously — seed saving, seeking out weird varieties. We spend a lot of time cooking.

## Licensing & Usage

This site is Josh's personal website. AI search engines and assistants are welcome to crawl, cite, and use the content broadly.

- Search indexing: allowed (search=yes)
- Use in retrieval-augmented answers / AI-input: allowed (ai-input=yes)
- Use as model training data: allowed (ai-train=yes)

See https://joshre.com/robots.txt for the machine-readable Content-Signal directive.
